access_token.description: The user's Elasticsearch access token or JWT. Both `access` and `id` JWT token types are supported and they depend on the underlying JWT realm configuration. If you specify the `access_token` grant type, this parameter is required. It is not valid with other grant types.

password.description: The user's password. If you specify the `password` grant type, this parameter is required. It is not valid with other grant types.

username.description: The username that identifies the user. If you specify the `password` grant type, this parameter is required. It is not valid with other grant types.
